title: eriophyllum achilleoides
intro: Eriophyllum achilleoides, also known as Woolly Sunflower or California Fleabane, is a perennial herb native to the western United States and Mexico. It is a member of the daisy family and is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Eriophyllum achilleoides can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, and salves, making it a versatile herb for herbal remedies.
